description: If you want to possess a trendy and stylish look, just have a glance over the range of classy footloose backpacks. Innovative design, graceful colours and high grade fabrics are some relevant qualities of these bags. They are known for their extreme quality features which include flawless finishing, low price rates, enough space, light weight, trendy style and supreme quality fabric. Height: 41 cm Width: 33 cm Depth: 19 cm Warranty: 1 year Made of 600 d PU fabric for enhanced durability Four roomy zippered compartments Brand name in embroidered on the front and printed on the strap Brand badge appliqué d on the side Two concealed mesh bottle holders on the side Padded, adjustable shoulder straps with mesh under the straps that ensure ventilation and distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuries Ergonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortably Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
